docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,704.00 FILED BY SZETO, TEDDY AS TO DEFENDANT YANG, SHERYL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ; CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)
